failures.fix_hint: Check config/document_types.json for the consignee code matching this consignee.

For each item below, use lookup_tariff with the item description to find the correct 8-digit CET end-node code. Then edit the XLSX file: set column F (TariffCode) and column AK (GroupBy) to the new code. After fixing, run validate_xlsx to confirm.
  HAWB9591350-Declaration_combined.xlsx row 4: "SpeedPAK Standard" [current: 00000000]
  HAWB9591350-Declaration_combined.xlsx row 31: "SpeedPAK Standard" [current: 00000000]

For each file: read_file the XLSX to see line items and totals (row 2 cols S=InvoiceTotal, T=Freight, U=Insurance, V=Tax, W=Deduction). Read the source invoice PDF to find unextracted charges. Use edit_file to correct values. Variance = InvoiceTotal - (SumItems + Freight + Insurance + Tax - Deduction). After fixing, run validate_xlsx to confirm.
  HAWB9591350-Declaration_combined.xlsx: Block 1 (row 2) variance $+1.70. InvoiceTotal($27.89) != NetTotal($26.19).
